exercises.title: URL Shortener Design
exercises.instructions: Walk through designing a URL shortener.
exercises.expected_solution: Requirements→API→DB→Algorithm→Scale. Use Base62 encoding for short codes. Cache with Redis. NoSQL for scale.

test_cases.expected: Requirements→API→DB→Algorithm→Scale. Use Base62 encoding for short codes. Cache with Redis. NoSQL for scale.

exercises.title: Rate Limiter
exercises.expected_solution: Tokens added at rate R. Each request consumes 1. If empty: 429. Redis for distributed. O(1) per check.

test_cases.expected: Tokens added at rate R. Each request consumes 1. If empty: 429. Redis for distributed. O(1) per check.

exercises.title: CAP Theorem
exercises.expected_solution: CP: MongoDB (banking). AP: Cassandra (social). CA: single-node RDBMS. Network partitions always happen → choose C or A.

test_cases.expected: CP: MongoDB (banking). AP: Cassandra (social). CA: single-node RDBMS. Network partitions always happen → choose C or A.

exercises.title: Design Zerodha Trading
exercises.expected_solution: Order gateway→Matching engine→PostgreSQL+Redis+Kafka. CP for money, AP for analytics.

test_cases.expected: Order gateway→Matching engine→PostgreSQL+Redis+Kafka. CP for money, AP for analytics.

exercises.title: SQL vs NoSQL Framework
exercises.expected_solution: SQL: ACID, joins, stable schema. Redis: cache. MongoDB: flexible schema. Cassandra: write-heavy scale.

test_cases.expected: SQL: ACID, joins, stable schema. Redis: cache. MongoDB: flexible schema. Cassandra: write-heavy scale.

exercises.title: URL Shortener DB Schema
exercises.instructions: Design the exact schema and indexes.
exercises.expected_solution: urls(short_code VARCHAR(7) PK, original_url TEXT, user_id, created_at). Index on user_id. Cache hot URLs.

test_cases.expected: urls(short_code VARCHAR(7) PK, original_url TEXT, user_id, created_at). Index on user_id. Cache hot URLs.

exercises.title: Design a Notification Service
exercises.expected_solution: Kafka topics per channel. Consumer groups per type. Idempotency keys. Retry with exponential backoff.

test_cases.expected: Kafka topics per channel. Consumer groups per type. Idempotency keys. Retry with exponential backoff.

exercises.title: Design Twitter Feed
exercises.expected_solution: Fan-out on write (precompute): O(1) read, O(n) write. Fan-out on read: O(n) read, O(1) write. Hybrid for celebrities.

test_cases.expected: Fan-out on write (precompute): O(1) read, O(n) write. Fan-out on read: O(n) read, O(1) write. Hybrid for celebrities.

exercises.title: Design WhatsApp
exercises.expected_solution: WebSocket for real-time. Message queue for offline delivery. Cassandra for message storage (write-heavy).

test_cases.expected: WebSocket for real-time. Message queue for offline delivery. Cassandra for message storage (write-heavy).

exercises.title: Caching strategies
exercises.instructions: LRU vs LFU vs TTL-based caching.
exercises.expected_solution: LRU: recency. LFU: frequency. TTL: time-based expiry. Cache-aside vs write-through vs write-behind.

test_cases.expected: LRU: recency. LFU: frequency. TTL: time-based expiry. Cache-aside vs write-through vs write-behind.

exercises.title: Design Razorpay Payment API
exercises.expected_solution: Idempotency key per request. Outbox pattern for reliability. Saga pattern for distributed transactions.

test_cases.expected: Idempotency key per request. Outbox pattern for reliability. Saga pattern for distributed transactions.

exercises.title: Load balancing algorithms
exercises.expected_solution: Round-robin: equal load. Least connections: variable workloads. IP hash: session stickiness.

test_cases.expected: Round-robin: equal load. Least connections: variable workloads. IP hash: session stickiness.

exercises.title: SD synthesis: rate limiter + URL shortener
exercises.instructions: Design both systems in 20 minutes combined.
exercises.expected_solution: Rate limiter: Redis + token bucket. URL shortener: Base62 + Redis cache + PostgreSQL/Cassandra.

test_cases.expected: Rate limiter: Redis + token bucket. URL shortener: Base62 + Redis cache + PostgreSQL/Cassandra.

exercises.title: SD synthesis: Zerodha + Razorpay
exercises.instructions: Compare architectural choices between trading and payments.
exercises.expected_solution: Both need ACID. Trading: CP, sub-ms latency. Payments: idempotency, saga, eventual consistency for reconciliation.

test_cases.expected: Both need ACID. Trading: CP, sub-ms latency. Payments: idempotency, saga, eventual consistency for reconciliation.

exercises.title: Complete SD Framework Synthesis
exercises.instructions: Apply 6-step framework to a new system: Flipkart search.
